texts:
Welcome to this station.
As you already know your role is to gather resources and sell them back to us.
Each day you have a quota to meet.
 There are consequences if you fail to do so.
Any questions?
...
You are free to go then.
It seems you have failed to fulfil your quota.
As of now your contract here is terminated.
It seems you have stumbled onto a breaking discovery.
This could shake our society to its core.
As you surely understand we can't have that right now.
So I have to terminate your contract.
